name: Adt Orchestrate
description: Coordinate multiple subagents/worktrees for parallel workstreams. Decomposes larger tasks into independent sub-tasks, dispatches each to a dedicated agent.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Adt Orchestrate
pt-BR.description: Coordene múltiplos subagentes/worktrees para workstreams paralelos. Decomponha projetos grandes em atribuições independentes.
